name: Adriatic Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Tomatoes, peeled and cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Carefully wash and dry the octopus, removing the mouth.
2. Place a saucepan on the stove and cover the bottom with olive oil.
3. Add rosemary, bay leaf, oregano, cumin seeds, parsley, chili pepper, and garlic to the pan.
4. Place the octopus on top of the herbs and season with salt and pepper.
5. Cover the pot tightly and simmer for about 45 minutes.
6. Cook spaghetti in plenty of boiling salted water until it is 'al dente' (firm to the bite).
7. Drain the spaghetti and transfer to a warm serving dish.
8. Mix the octopus sauce into the cooked spaghetti.
9. Serve hot.
